user.title: Samsung 2878 AC
user.description: Enter your Samsung AC connection details.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AC. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid token. Re-pair the AC to get a new token.

init.title: Samsung 2878 AC options
init.description: Select the swing modes your AC physically supports. Many wall-mount units only have a vertical (up/down) louver and no horizontal swivel, so Horizontal and Both have no effect even though the AC acknowledges them.
